startups.rationale: Nearpod позволяет учителям создавать интерактивные уроки с элементами вовлечения на устройствах учеников, что наиболее близко к агенту, встраивающему интерактивные механики в учебные материалы.

startups.name: Newsela
startups.description: Instructional content platform that delivers engaging, non-fiction content across subjects at reading levels appropriate for each student.
startups.rationale: Платформа Newsela предоставляет одни и те же статьи на разных уровнях сложности чтения, что точно соответствует функции агента «Разноуровневый контент» — создание вариантов заданий разного уровня по одной теме.

startups.name: Nurture
startups.description: Learn Foundational Life Skills Through Immersive Play
startups.rationale: Агент генерации игрового учебного контента наиболее близок к платформе для обучения жизненным навыкам через иммерсивную игру, так как создает учебные модули в игровом формате.

startups.name: Outsmart
startups.description: Designing higher education for the world today — AI-native, affordable, and aligned with how people actually learn and work
startups.rationale: Стартап Outsmart создаёт ИИ-ориентированное высшее образование, что напрямую связано с автоматической генерацией учебного контента, предлагаемой агентом 12.

startups.name: Padlet
startups.description: A productivity and authoring tool optimized for visual storytelling and mobile collaboration.
startups.rationale: Padlet — это виртуальная доска для совместной визуальной работы, что полностью совпадает с назначением агента 'Виртуальная доска'.

startups.name: Paper
startups.description: Making 24/7 academic support accessible to all students
startups.rationale: Стартап предоставляет круглосуточную академическую поддержку, отвечая на вопросы студентов, что соответствует ИИ-помощнику (агент 8) с возможностью передачи сложных вопросов учителю.

startups.name: Pathfinder
startups.description: The AI agent that manages the homeschooling experience for families
startups.rationale: Агент 4 генерирует и адаптирует персональный план обучения, что является ядром управления опытом домашнего обучения.

startups.name: PeerTeach
startups.description: Supercharging math classes with data-driven peer tutoring
startups.rationale: Стартап о data-driven взаимном обучении не соответствует ни одному конкретному агенту каталога; ближайшие по теме сотрудничества агенты не отражают сущность peer tutoring.

startups.name: Pensieve
startups.description: AI Grader & Tutor for higher ed: automate grading and give personalized learning experience to students
startups.rationale: ИИ-агент формирующей обратной связи (24) генерирует персонализированную развивающую обратную связь с рекомендациями, что соответствует функции AI-тьютора для персонализированного обучения после автоматической проверки работ.

startups.name: PeopleGrove
startups.description: Mentoring and advising platform that enables personalized support for college students.
startups.rationale: Платформа персонализированной поддержки через менторинг и консультирование включает карьерное сопровождение, что частично совпадает с функционалом ИИ-профориентолога по увязке учебных целей с профессиональными перспективами.

startups.name: Polygence
startups.description: Mentorship program connecting curious students to leading academics around hands-on research projects.
startups.rationale: Программа менторства создаёт персонализированный план исследовательского проекта, что соответствует функции генерации траектории.

startups.name: Preply
startups.description: Language learning marketplace featuring the best online tutors.
startups.rationale: Preply — это маркетплейс для поиска репетиторов, а не ИИ-агент для автоматизации образовательного процесса, и ни один из перечисленных агентов не соответствует его сути.

startups.name: Realworld
startups.description: The one-stop-shop to navigate adulthood and big life moments.
startups.rationale: ИИ-профориентолог помогает связать учебные цели с карьерными перспективами, что является частью навигации взрослой жизни, хотя охватывает лишь один аспект.

startups.name: Rhithm
startups.description: Social-emotional learning and school-based mental health solution.
startups.rationale: Сервис заботы о самочувствии отслеживает эмоциональное состояние и предлагает поддержку, что полностью соответствует решению Rhithm для социально-эмоционального обучения и психического здоровья в школе.

startups.name: Riipen
startups.description: Connecting students with companies to work on real projects, for course credit.
startups.rationale: Стартап Riipen соединяет студентов с компаниями для реальных проектов, что не соответствует ни одному ИИ-агенту из каталога.

startups.name: SchoolMint
startups.description: Student enrollment solution that enables school choice for families.
startups.rationale: Стартап SchoolMint предназначен для зачисления учащихся и выбора школы, что не соответствует ни одному ИИ-агенту из каталога, ориентированного на персонализированное обучение.

startups.name: Schoolzilla
startups.description: Real-time data dashboards to power great schools.
startups.rationale: Стартап предлагает дашборды данных в реальном времени для школ, что наиболее близко к функциональности агента ИИ-выгрузки и отчеты, формирующего аналитические отчёты с визуализациями.

startups.name: Scout
startups.description: Making learning business and finance entertaining, engaging, and accessible.
startups.rationale: Стартап делает обучение бизнесу и финансам увлекательным через игровые форматы, что соответствует агенту Игровой учебный контент, предоставляющему учебные материалы в игровом формате.

startups.name: Scout Edu
startups.description: The AI-native student information system for K-12 schools.
startups.rationale: Стартап представляет собой ИИ-систему управления данными учащихся, наиболее близкую к агенту формирования аналитических отчётов о прогрессе, так как обратная связь через отчётность и аналитику — её ключевая функция.

startups.name: Seesaw
startups.description: Helping teachers, students, families, and school leaders work together to elevate learning
startups.rationale: Seesaw — это цифровое портфолио и коммуникационная платформа для совместной работы учителей, учеников и семей, что ближе всего к агенту автоматического сбора достижений в структурированное портфолио.

startups.name: SmartPass
startups.description: A digital hall pass that increases time in class, curbs vandalism, and makes school safer
startups.rationale: Цифровой пропуск для передвижения по школе не совпадает ни с одним агентом ПМО.

startups.name: Songscription
startups.description: Empowering musicians worldwide to play and share the songs they love
startups.rationale: Платформа для музыкантов по разучиванию и обмену песнями не имеет прямого аналога среди ИИ-агентов, сфокусированных на педагогических задачах общего образования.

startups.name: Springboard
startups.description: Workforce training for in-demand digital skills.
startups.rationale: Springboard фокусируется на карьерно-ориентированном обучении цифровым навыкам, что ближе всего к агенту ИИ-профориентолога, соотносящего учебные цели с профессиональными перспективами.

startups.name: Sprout Labs
startups.description: Predicting reading difficulties for students and empowering teachers, parents and clinicians with customized action plans and resources.
startups.rationale: Стартап прогнозирует трудности чтения и предоставляет персонализированные планы действий и ресурсы, что соответствует агенту, формирующему аналитические отчёты с выводами и рекомендациями.

startups.name: Stellic
startups.description: Powering the path to graduation
startups.rationale: Стартап Stellic создает персонализированные планы обучения для достижения выпускных целей, что наиболее близко к ИИ-агенту генерации траектории.

startups.name: SuperHi
startups.description: The education protocol of the internet, allowing people to learn and get paid for sharing high-quality, accessible skills content.
startups.rationale: Стартап представляет собой протокол для обмена образовательным контентом с оплатой авторам, что не соответствует функционалу ни одного из 44 ИИ-агентов каталога.

startups.name: Suraasa
startups.description: Helping global teachers achieve greater professional and financial growth in their careers.
startups.rationale: Стартап помогает учителям достигать карьерного роста через персонализированные планы развития, что совпадает с задачей агента генерации траектории обучения.

startups.name: TeachFX
startups.description: Analyzing classroom dialogue to empower teachers with feedback on student engagement
startups.rationale: Ни один агент каталога не анализирует диалоги в классе для предоставления учителям обратной связи о вовлечённости учеников.

startups.name: TeachShare
startups.description: The one-stop shop for adaptive education — create, differentiate, gamify, share, auto-grade, sell — all on one platform
startups.rationale: Стартап является всеобъемлющей платформой для адаптивного образования, охватывая создание, дифференциацию, геймификацию, автоматическую проверку и продажи, что не соответствует ни одному узкоспециализированному ИИ-агенту каталога.

startups.name: Teachy
startups.description: AI-powered workspace for teachers
startups.rationale: Teachy — это общее AI-рабочее пространство для учителей, не соответствующее ни одному узкоспециализированному агенту из каталога.

startups.name: The Podcast App
startups.description: Powerful, intuitive search platform for the world of podcasting
startups.rationale: Платформа поиска подкастов не является образовательным ИИ-агентом и не соответствует ни одному из 44 решений для персонализированной модели образования.

startups.name: Thinkverse
startups.description: An AI math tutor for every K-12 student
startups.rationale: Стартап Thinkverse — это AI-тьютор по математике, который по сути является ИИ-ассистентом, отвечающим на вопросы учеников и предоставляющим разъяснения, что полностью совпадает с назначением агента 'ИИ-помощник'.

startups.name: Twenty
startups.description: Real-world career & life advice to help people crush their twenties
startups.rationale: Стартап предоставляет карьерные и жизненные советы для людей в возрасте около 20 лет, что ближе всего к агенту профориентации, соотносящему учебные цели с профессиональными перспективами.

startups.name: Tynker
startups.description: Self-paced coding courses for kids
startups.rationale: Платформа Tynker предлагает готовые интерактивные курсы по программированию в игровом формате, что соответствует концепции агента, генерирующего игровой учебный контент, хотя Tynker использует заранее созданные материалы, а не ИИ-генерацию.

startups.name: Wayfinder
startups.description: Culturally responsive social-emotional learning and mental health curriculum designed to help students find meaning in today’s world.
startups.rationale: Стартап представляет собой целостную программу социально-эмоционального обучения и ментального здоровья, не соответствующую ни одному узкопрофильному ИИ-агенту из каталога, который охватывает персонализированные траектории, генерацию контента, обратную связь, геймификацию и совместную работу.

startups.name: WriteLab
startups.description: Immediate, automated writing feedback powered by artificial intelligence.
startups.rationale: WriteLab предоставляет автоматическую обратную связь по письменным работам, что соответствует агенту формирующей обратной связи с рекомендациями по улучшению.

startups.name: Elevate
startups.description: Elevate is a new type of cognitive-training tool designed to build communication and analytical skills. Users receive a personalized gamified program that evolves with their performance, encouraging them to keep learning.
startups.rationale: Elevate — это персонализированная геймифицированная программа для тренировки навыков с миссиями и челленджами, а 37-й агент как раз создаёт игровые механики миссий и соревнований, отслеживая выполнение.

startups.name: Harmonic
startups.description: Harmonic is building a state-of-the-art mathematical reasoning engine in pursuit of mathematical superintelligence. It aims to change the way math is taught, build truthful AI and verify software for safety-critical domains.
startups.rationale: Harmonic разрабатывает математический движок рассуждений и не соответствует ни одному ИИ-агенту каталога, ориентированному на персонализацию, учебный контент, обратную связь, геймификацию или совместную работу.

startups.name: Studeo
startups.description: Studeo is on a mission to revolutionise education by digitalising and democratising elite tutoring. On its mission to revolutionise the way education is taught, Studeo hires the best and most passionate tutors and bring their knowledge into a video learning app accessible across the world at a fraction of the cost of private tutoring. Studeo exists to give 100% of students access to generally inaccessible resources. We aim to be the number one platform for students willing to learn faster and get the right tips to enter top universities.
startups.rationale: Studeo предоставляет библиотеку видеоуроков от лучших репетиторов, что совпадает с функцией структурированной библиотеки готовых учебных материалов с поиском и фильтрацией.

startups.name: Outschool
startups.description:
Outschool is an innovative education platform that offers a variety of engaging, small-group classes online. Unlike traditional classes, Outschool classes give kids the unique opportunity to explore their interests in-depth via interactive, live video by experienced, independent educators.

When Outschool was founded in 2015, homeschoolers were the first to discover our classes, but it wasn’t long before kids in conventional schools began supplementing their education with fun and unique, interest-based classes. During the COVID-19 pandemic, Outschool became vital to families who wanted to keep kids learning, social, and pursuing their passions.
Today, Outschool offers more than 140,000 live online classes to more than 1,000,000 learners in 183 countries worldwide.
startups.rationale: Outschool предоставляет живые онлайн-классы в малых группах через видео, что соответствует функциональности видеосервиса с комнатами для групповой работы (агент 43).

startups.name: GiveCampus
startups.description: GiveCampus is the world's #1 fundraising platform for non-profit educational institutions. Trusted by millions of donors and more than 1,500 colleges, universities, and K-12 schools, our mission is to advance the quality, the affordability, and the accessibility of education. Since 2015, we have facilitated more than $7 billion in charitable giving.
startups.rationale: GiveCampus — это платформа для фандрайзинга в сфере образования, а не инструмент для персонализации обучения или создания учебного контента.

startups.name: Platzi
startups.description:
Platzi cracked online education. It teaches courses on design, marketing and programming with a 70% completion rate, to over one million students worldwide.

The classes include real-time collaboration among students and industry leaders as teachers. It aims to be the professional home for lifelong learning of advanced skills.
startups.rationale: Платформа Platzi с живыми занятиями и совместной работой студентов в реальном времени наиболее близка к функциональности видео-сервиса с групповыми комнатами, обеспечивающего интерактивное обучение.

startups.name: Cambly
startups.description: The Cambly app gives English learners instant 1-on-1 access to friendly native speakers over video chat 24/7. Students get an affordable and convenient way to practice their English and gain confidence. Tutors get to make money helping people from around the world practice English.
startups.rationale: Cambly является платформой для живого общения с репетиторами, а не ИИ-агентом; каталог содержит только автоматизированные ИИ-инструменты, аналогов нет.

startups.name: Panorama Education
startups.description: Panorama Education partners with K-12 districts to support student success in the classroom and beyond through a secure, research-backed software platform for AI, student support, and community voice and engagement. Serving 15 million students nationwide, Panorama helps educators boost achievement, attendance, behavior, and readiness for graduation and beyond.
startups.rationale: Платформа Panorama Education ориентирована на аналитику успеваемости, посещаемости и поведения, что наиболее близко к агенту ИИ-выгрузки и отчеты, формирующему аналитические отчёты о прогрессе учеников для принятия решений.

startups.name: CleverDeck
startups.description:
CleverDeck is a customizable-spaced repetition flashcard application for learning foreign language vocabulary.

It contains more than three thousand useful words along with images, native speaker audio, and example sentences.
startups.rationale: CleverDeck предоставляет структурированную библиотеку готовых флеш-карточек с лексикой, изображениями и аудио, что наиболее близко к агенту «Библиотека контента».

startups.name: Risely AI
startups.description:
Risely’s AI agents will form the new operating system for universities, improving retention, staff productivity, and efficiency. Our platform integrates directly into existing university systems (SIS, LMS, CRM), learns each institution’s unique workflows, and deploys specialized AI agents. This dramatically reduces the $735 billion universities spend annually on administrative labor, expands staff capacity without increasing headcount, and improves the student experience.

This hasn't been done before because university workflows require nuanced, autonomous judgment, exactly what agentic AI was designed to solve. Our team uniquely combines deep expertise in higher education, enterprise-scale AI, and regulated enterprise sales.

Sadia previously built Salesforce’s Education Cloud from scratch, creating the core Student Information System widely used across higher education. She deeply understands university operations and maintains trusted relationships with hundreds of higher-ed CIOs and Provosts.

Danial was one of DoorDash’s earliest engineers, where he architected and scaled complex systems from zero to billions of transactions, including their search, recommendation, and Voice AI platforms. He knows how to build robust AI solutions that reliably perform at enterprise scale.

Shahryar was a GM at Airwallex, where he built the entire Americas business from 0 to 1 and drove 11x revenue growth.  He’s also a master closer, single-handedly securing over $17M in enterprise deals at NerdWallet.  He’s a relentless startup executor with deep expertise launching and scaling go-to-market machines in highly regulated industries.

We launched six weeks ago and are already at $8k MRR, growing 55% week-over-week -- one of the fastest ramps ever in higher ed. Universities urgently need solutions that expand labor capacity and efficiency, especially as they face unprecedented budget pressure and staffing shortages.

With unmatched buyer access, deep technical expertise, and rapid early traction, we are perfectly positioned to own this enormous market.
startups.rationale: Стартап создает административную платформу с ИИ-агентами для оптимизации процессов вузов, что не соответствует ни одному учебно-педагогическому агенту каталога.

startups.name: Frizzle
startups.description:
Frizzle uses AI to grade handwritten math assignments for teachers and transform them into rich analytics and differentiated assessment to help personalize instruction for every student. Teachers spend over 10 hours a week or 25% of all their work grading - Frizzle does it in minutes. Frizzle is the most valuable piece of software for teachers ever, as it eliminates the most time-consuming part of their workflow so they can focus on teaching.

Frizzle shifts education from waterfall to agile learning. Instead of waiting for end-of-unit tests to discover gaps, teachers get continuous, real-time insight into student thinking from everyday work. Feedback becomes immediate, instruction adapts weekly, and learning iterates (measure, adjust, improve) so every student progresses faster with less teacher burnout.

Frizzle was named an official White House AI Education Partner alongside OpenAI and Meta: https://www.whitehouse.gov/edai/.

Frizzle was co-founded by Abhay Gupta and Shyam Sai, who met in high school over 10 years ago.
startups.rationale: Стартап автоматизирует проверку письменных математических заданий и предоставляет аналитику, что соответствует агенту ИИ-проверки задач, который также автоматизирует проверку стандартных заданий и выделяет типичные ошибки.

startups.name: Tegore
startups.description:
Tegore follows K-12 school curriculum to design courses like Algebra I & Algebra II. In addition to working with high schools in the Bay Area to design the best in-classroom experiences, Tegore is developing the corresponding consumer product, a Duolingo for Math.

Each lesson in Tegore follows a lesson plan (e.g. Polynomial Long Division), and the content is delivered with voice / interactive visuals, and checks students' understanding by using dialectic teaching.
startups.rationale: Tegore — это «Duolingo для математики» с интерактивными игровыми уроками, что соответствует агенту «Игровой учебный контент», который предоставляет учебные материалы в игровом формате для вовлечения.

startups.name: Chiron
startups.description: Chiron is an iPad app that understands math as it’s written - like Grammarly for algebra. We’re both Oxford math grads, have tutored for a decade, and we’re creating the future of learning which will be entirely 1-on-1.
startups.rationale: Chiron, как «Grammarly для алгебры», автоматически проверяет математические решения и даёт обратную связь, что ближе всего к ИИ-асессору, оценивающему сложные работы.

startups.name: Units
startups.description:
Units lets ambitious students graduate high school in 4 months instead of 4 years with real accredited diploma credits, plus a portfolio of real-world work, not just a transcript.

We're rebuilding school for a post-AGI world.
startups.rationale: Стартап фокусируется на ускоренной персонализированной образовательной траектории для получения диплома, что близко к ИИ-генератору траектории.

startups.name: YouLearn
startups.description: YouLearn is an AI tutor for college students. It turns your learning materials into concise notes, an AI tutor you can talk to, and personalized tests.
startups.rationale: YouLearn's conversational AI tutor aligns with the AI assistant that answers student questions on course content.

startups.name: Miyagi Labs
startups.description:
Miyagi Labs is an AI-powered exam prep platform that helps students ace tests like the SAT and ACT through our AI tutor, personalized study plans, thousands of practice questions, and realistic practice exams.

We’re building the platform we wish we had when studying for exams. No more running out of practice questions. Track your progress as your rating in different exam categories increases, and know exactly what you need to practice most.

We envision a world where students anywhere can come to Miyagi to ace their exams and receive personalized, world-class AI tutoring designed to unlock their full potential.
startups.rationale: Стартап предоставляет AI-персонализированные учебные планы с адаптацией под прогресс, что полностью соответствует агенту генерации траектории на основе диагностики и целей.

startups.name: Alice.tech
startups.description:
Alice turns generic course materials into personalized learning and exam prep using AI. We’re Duolingo  for exams, and more than 10k college students have already used Alice.

Kim, the CEO, is a domain expert in education with more than 10+ years of university teaching experience. He is also technical by background.

MRR is $20k, growing +10% week-over-week the last 8 weeks

Alice's core market opportunity is +$10b, with the global education market being almost $10trillion. As AI starts to disrupt education, Alice will use in-built network effects and virality in its product to create a global winner.

Go Alice. Thank you!
startups.rationale: Стартап превращает общие материалы в персонализированное обучение и подготовку к экзаменам, что наиболее близко к ИИ-агенту генерации траектории, создающему персонализированный план и корректирующему маршрут.

startups.name: Excellence Learning
startups.description:
Excellence an after-school maths and science program. We replace/supplement private tutoring and long-term study programs such as Kumon (over 30B TAM). US Parents are our primary customers.

Our web and iPad software serves both ambitious and struggling students. As we believe each student is unique, we adapt our high quality courses and exercises to their knowledge and learning style in a very granular way. To facilitate learning, they get detailed text, voice and graphical explanations, can craft study plans, revise and memorize, and received human mentorship if needed. We believe LLMs have made edtech interesting, as technology now allows us to replicate a tutoring learning experience.

In addition, we offer a program with daily courses and exercises, detailed feedback on their worksheets and more (super Kumon).

Finally we sell the AI tutoring and exercise databases to schools in a B2B and B2B2C model and already work for the most prestigious institutions in France (Ecole polytechnique, college Stanislas...).

We're a passionate team of ex-quants, mathematicians and physics champions devoted to improving science education.
startups.rationale: Стартап Excellence Learning строит персонализированные адаптивные учебные планы, корректирует маршрут и темп, что соответствует агенту генерации траектории.

startups.name: Edexia
startups.description:
Edexia is an AI Teacher Assistant for grading essays. It can be trained and controlled by the teacher and can grade assignments from any curriculum, year level, subject, or format.

Learning like a teacher, Edexia visually breaks down its understanding of the rubric, and updates this as a teacher corrects it.

Our vision is to transform education by facilitating AI’s safe and effective integration across all institutions and applications. Not using AI to replace teachers but rather to empower them—providing them with all the time and resources they need to develop their students.
startups.rationale: Стартап предлагает ИИ-ассистента для оценки эссе с возможностью обучения от учителя, что практически полностью совпадает с функцией ИИ-асессора, автоматически оценивающего сложные творческие работы по критериям.

startups.name: RevisionDojo
startups.description:
RevisionDojo is building the AI study platform students actually obsess over.

Our platform houses pre-loaded question sets, study notes, mini-lessons guided by an AI tutor that adapts to each student individually.
startups.rationale: AI-тьютор, адаптирующийся к каждому ученику, прямо соответствует ИИ-помощнику, который анализирует контекст и уровень ученика, давая объяснения и подсказки.

startups.name: Educato
startups.description:
Educato builds exam prep platforms worldwide using AI.

Online exam prep has existed for decades, yet the big players all target the same top 10 exams in the US. The reality is that most exams around the world still have little to no quality online prep material, including many taken by hundreds of thousands of students each year. Educato uses AI to generate high-quality prep content for these exams. LLMs allow us to target the profitable fat middle in the distribution of exams, historically overlooked by education companies.
startups.rationale: Стартап генерирует учебный контент для подготовки к экзаменам с помощью ИИ, что напрямую соответствует функции ИИ-генератора контента по созданию материалов по заданной теме.

startups.name: Mathos
startups.description:
Mathos AI (Formerly MathGPTPro) is the leading AI math solver that enables academic performance and productivity of both students and teachers. It has empowered over 1M students from over 200 countries in the past year, which turns the previously mission-impossible personalized learning into real. Our advanced math AI model achieves roughly 20% higher accuracy in mathematical and quantitative problem-solving capabilities then GPT4o.

As we move forward, we will tackle the hardest problems in the educational sector, personalization, adaptive learning, and shortages of teachers, with our trial runs in schools. By automating grading, providing insightful analytics, and generating adaptive assignments, our model empowers teachers to understand what their students need and what should be provided accordingly.
startups.rationale: Mathos AI — в первую очередь автоматический решатель математических задач и проверка работ, что наиболее близко к агенту ИИ-проверка задач.

startups.name: Shepherd
startups.description: Shepherd is a Learning assistant for schools to provide to their students. Shepherd seamlessly combines AI-enabled self-study, affordable tutoring, peer collaboration, and analytics for a personalized learning experience that is both efficient and effective.
startups.rationale: Стартап представляет собой комплексную обучающую платформу, сочетающую самообучение с ИИ, тьюторинг, совместную работу и аналитику, что не соответствует ни одному узкоспециализированному ИИ-агенту из каталога.

startups.name: Deep24
startups.description: Deep24 is a coach that syncs with all your data source, understanding you and then coming up with plans to improve your life.
startups.rationale: Стартап является общим лайф-коучем для улучшения жизни, не привязанным к образовательному процессу, и не соответствует функциональности ни одного ИИ-агента из каталога ПМО.

startups.name: MathDash
startups.description: MathDash is an online math education platform that gets students addicted to working through textbooks and seeing their improvement.
startups.rationale: MathDash мотивирует учеников через игровые механики, отслеживание прогресса и, вероятно, соревновательные элементы, что ближе всего к агенту по созданию миссий, челленджей и соревнований.

startups.name: Flint
startups.description:
Flint is an AI-powered personalized learning platform for K-12 schools, helping teachers deliver individualized instruction at scale. Trusted by 500,000+ educators and students, Flint has powered learning activities that increase student engagement, academic performance, and collaboration.

Through AI-driven tutoring, real-time feedback, and interactive learning experiences, Flint enables every student to receive personalized support without adding to teacher workload.

With AI-native student analytics, educators gain full visibility into student progress, strengths, and areas for improvement, while saving time on grading, lesson planning, and differentiation. Students receive a 24/7 AI tutor that adapts to their level without giving away answers, supporting deeper understanding and independent thinking.

For schools and districts, Flint provides robust AI guardrails, including customizable moderation, grade-level controls, and full transparency into student usage, ensuring safe and responsible AI adoption.
startups.rationale: Стартап предоставляет ИИ-тьютора, который адаптируется к уровню ученика и даёт пояснения без прямых ответов, что наиболее близко к агенту ИИ-помощника для ответов на вопросы.

startups.name: Studdy
startups.description:
At Studdy, our mission is to unlock the full potential of the next generation by providing a personalized AI tutor for every student.

Studdy Buddy is a multilingual tutor that uses AI, as well as advanced speech, text, and image recognition technology to supercharge students' ability to learn new subjects.

We believe that making self-learning as easy as possible for as many students as possible (no matter their cultural, social, or educational background) is the key to unlocking the full potential of students around the world.

We're a passionate team of AI experts, educators, and builders - if you also have a passion for transforming education we'd love to hear from you.

Shoot us a message at team@studdy.ai!
startups.rationale: Studdy Buddy — это AI-тьютор, отвечающий на вопросы учеников и помогающий им осваивать материал, что наиболее близко к функционалу агента 'ИИ-помощник' (8), дающего объяснения и подсказки по содержанию курса.

startups.name: Ora AI
startups.description: Ora is an AI-native education platform that students love. We're starting with medical school, training students from matriculation to MD. Soon, we'll serve every corner of the $830B higher education market.
startups.rationale: Стартап создаёт AI-платформу для студентов-медиков, которая, судя по описанию, включает интеллектуального помощника для ответов на вопросы и сопровождения обучения, что ближе всего к ИИ-помощнику, отвечающему на вопросы учеников по содержанию курса.

startups.name: Epsilon
startups.description: Get answers to research questions with citations from the academic literature.
startups.rationale: Стартап предоставляет ИИ-ассистента для ответов на исследовательские вопросы с цитатами, что ближе всего к агенту ИИ-помощник, отвечающему на вопросы учеников по содержанию курса, но с меньшим соответствием узкой специализации на академических источниках.

startups.name: Univerbal
startups.description:
Univerbal is an AI-powered language learning app that helps people boost their confidence simply by talking. In unscripted and dynamic conversations, users can talk about anything they’d like using the microphone, with the AI responding as it adapts to their level and skills. Each user gets a personal AI Language Tutor that creates a custom learning plan based on the language goals they’d like to work towards and their own interests, offers instant corrections after every message and helps users in their own language.
Based in the country with 4 official languages, Switzerland, in 2024 we were selected as one of WIRED’s Hottest 100 Startups in Europe.
startups.rationale: Стартап Univerbal предоставляет персонализированного AI-тьютора для языковой практики с мгновенной обратной связью и адаптацией к уровню, что наиболее близко к агенту ИИ-помощник (8), который отвечает на вопросы учеников по содержанию курса с учётом контекста и уровня.

startups.name: SuperKalam
startups.description: Every student deserve personal attention. With AI, we can infinitely scale personalised learning experience at scale to every student. That's what we are building at SuperKalam.
startups.rationale: Стартап создаёт ИИ-платформу для масштабирования персонализированного обучения, что наиболее близко к агенту генерации персонализированной траектории, формирующему пошаговый план обучения.

startups.name: Darsel
startups.description: Darsel is a AI-powered math education chatbot which is designed to supplement K12 education systems in resource-constrained environments. Darsel allows students to practice math questions & do their homework through platforms like SMS, WhatsApp and Facebook Messenger.
startups.rationale: Стартап Darsel представляет собой ИИ-бота для практики математики, который отвечает на вопросы учеников и помогает с домашними заданиями, что соответствует агенту "ИИ-помощник", отвечающему на вопросы учеников по содержанию курса.

startups.name: Avocademy
startups.description: Avocademy was born from a need for more diverse designers. Current design programs are expensive and not accessible. We make it accessible for anyone to break into the field and change careers. Our students are 75% women, 65% BIPOC, & 33% LGBTQ+.
startups.rationale: Агент 9 помогает связать учебные цели с карьерными перспективами, что близко к миссии Avocademy по обеспечению смены карьеры в дизайне.

startups.name: Lingt
startups.description: Lingt empowers teachers to speak more with their students. Create and manage online speaking assignments for use in the classroom.
startups.rationale: Платформа Lingt для создания и управления устными заданиями не соответствует ни одному ИИ-агенту из каталога.

startups.name: MySivi
startups.description:
MySivi is an AI-powered English learning app.

Learn English Speaking The Fastest Way (AI + Human) 😀
Practicing with AI English Tutor and Human is the fastest way to learn to speak. Try now to feel the change within a week.
startups.rationale: MySivi представляет собой ИИ-тьютора для практики разговорного английского, что ближе всего к ИИ-помощнику, взаимодействующему с учеником и помогающему в обучении.

startups.name: Koala
startups.description:
PROBLEM 😩

Zoom is great for adults, not ideal to engage an 8 year old online.

SOLUTION 🔥

Koala Go, the award-winning interactive platform for online teaching businesses.

Learn more at https://teachwithkoala.com/
startups.rationale: Koala — это целостная интерактивная платформа для проведения онлайн-занятий, не соответствующая ни одному из описанных ИИ-агентов, которые являются отдельными функциональными модулями.

startups.name: Emerge Career
startups.description: Vocational training programs and workforce management software for government agencies looking to create high-paying jobs and up-skill their low-income and justice-involved citizens out of poverty.
startups.rationale: Стартап предоставляет профессиональное обучение и управление трудовыми ресурсами для трудоустройства, что совпадает с функцией ИИ-профориентолога, связывающего учебные цели с карьерными перспективами.

startups.name: Careerist
startups.description:
Careerist is an ed-fintech platform that trains job seekers for tech careers (in QA, Sales, Support & more), finances them and automates their job hunting. Our B2B2C platform aggregates job seekers, tutors and employers – streamlining training and placement.

Techcrunch: "Edtech meets SaaS in Careerist’s job placement learning platform. The startup trains job seekers through live and self-paced training taught by third-party tutors. The adaptive learning software is meant to help candidates prep for tech interviews. Once a candidate is well equipped, Careerist uses automation to help them apply for jobs."
startups.rationale: Careerist фокусируется на обучении для трудоустройства в IT и связывает учебные цели с карьерными перспективами, что близко к агенту ИИ-профориентологу, соотносящему цели с профессиями.

startups.name: Stepful
startups.description: Stepful trains people with a high school education in 4 months and places them into healthcare jobs. Healthcare is the fastest growing industry in the US accounting for 40% of all jobs added including medical assistants, nursing assistants, and phlebotomists.
startups.rationale: Стартап является сервисом обучения и трудоустройства, не предоставляющим ИИ-инструменты и не соответствующим функционалу ни одного из агентов каталога.

startups.name: Pandai
startups.description:
💡 What is Pandai?

Pandai is an app that helps students get better grades in school.

Pandai provides gamified quizzes aligned to a specific school curriculum, from which students can learn, practice, get feedback, and diagnose their weaknesses.

🔥 Why do we build this?

In Southeast Asia, the education system is competitive and exam-oriented.

There is a huge demand for interventions (tutors, workbooks, and extra classes) to help students perform better in school. Pandai fills the demand with a solution that is better than the alternatives.

👨‍🏫 Who We Are

The three founders are based in Malaysia and have known each other since high school, 23 years ago.

After we graduated (from MIT & other US colleges), we started our first education company in 2007, focusing on coaching school students in STEM subjects.

We worked closely with students (many of them from underprivileged backgrounds) and saw firsthand the impact we’ve had on them.

We then realized that with technology, we could reach more students and bring more impact. Hence, we released Pandai in 2020.

🚀 Present & Future

Currently, we have launched in our home ground Malaysia in 2020.

So far, 280,000 students have completed 83 million questions on Pandai, and 92% of users have seen some improvement in their academic performance.

We plan to expand to Southeast Asia and other emerging markets, a market of 100M+ school students. Pandai is designed to be scalable, and our content (also available in English) can be mapped to other curricula from other countries.
startups.rationale: Приложение предоставляет геймифицированные викторины по школьной программе с автоматической проверкой и обратной связью, что наиболее близко к агенту создания интерактивных викторин.

startups.name: Novatr
startups.description:
Novatr (YC S21) offers online cohort-based courses for architects, engineers and designers in the AEC industry to advance their professional growth. We serve learners from 45+ countries including India, MENA, USA, Europe, and SEA. Our courses are delivered by professionals from global firms like Autodesk, BIG, Google, UNStudio, AECOM, and graduates are placed at top-tier architecture firms, construction companies and real estate companies.

Project-based learning and peer-to-peer interaction in cohort makes learning enriching and increases the completion rates to 84%. Learners work in groups of 2-6 on live projects and create significant outputs from scratch.

The company is led by alumni of SPA Delhi and IIT Madras.
startups.rationale: Стартап предлагает когортные онлайн-курсы с проектной групповой работой, что наиболее близко к виртуальному рабочему пространству для группового взаимодействия (агент 39).

startups.name: Filadd
startups.description:
We provide premium, personalized courses for college entrance exams (like Chile’s PAES and Brazil’s ENEM) combining engaging video lessons, live tutoring, AI-powered study plans, and downloadable resources.
Today we serve over 25,000 students annually across Chile, Brazil, Argentina, and Colombia, with a 90% YoY growth and industry-leading margins.
startups.rationale: Стартап предлагает AI-управляемые учебные планы для подготовки к экзаменам, что соответствует агенту генерации персонализированной траектории.

startups.name: Litnerd
startups.description:
Litnerd is a kids reading + writing club app that grew by 14x this past school year. Think of us as a modern-day Scholastic, with a heavy IP play. We create original IP with our community + partner brands -> turn them into books, media and learning curriculum, layered with an AI personalized tutor to help kids learn to read and write in a personalized and engaging way.

Our product format is a Social and Gamified - with a live weekly community meetup and monthly e-tournaments.

- And it works! Litnerd 4x improved the pass rate of students on their annual state Reading (ELA) exam.
- STICKY: Kids spend 10-20 minutes on the Litnerd app OUTSIDE of classroom time.
- KID AUTHORS: Kids are the authors of the books and Litnerd AI helps illustrate + publish the book.
- Built on the Science of Reading
- Original IP: all books, media and courseware is original content created and published by Litnerd.
startups.rationale: Ключевая функция Litnerd — AI-персонализированный тьютор, который выстраивает адаптивный план обучения чтению и письму, что наиболее близко к генерации персонализированной траектории.

startups.name: Spark Studio
startups.description:
Meet Sparky, a fun and quirky AI buddy in the avatar of a friendly fox who kids can just speak with to build fluency and confidence with English speaking.
Powered by Generative AI, and made magical with child-appropriate experience, features and topics, Sparky brings a whole world of knowledge and a judgement-free environment for kids to become comfortable with speaking English.

142 countries (outside English dominant countries) mandate English learning as part of the national education policy. These kids have exposure to English but feel underconfident and embarrassed to speak. The biggest problem across the classes and books they get, is the lack of real conversational practice. With AI, we're making this affordable accessible and enjoyable for kids across the world.

We're a passionate team of educators with over 30 years of combined experience in building education products for kids and have held leadership positions are India's biggest education companies - Byju's and LEAD.
startups.rationale: Spark Studio — это ИИ-ассистент для разговорной практики английского, который ближе всего к агенту 'ИИ-помощник', так как оба взаимодействуют с учеником в диалоговом формате для поддержки обучения, хотя помощник ориентирован на ответы по содержанию курса, а Sparky — на свободное общение для развития беглости.

startups.name: Kurios
startups.description:
Kurios is cohort based online courses for professionals in Latin America. Our instructors are professionals coming out of tech companies like Google, Amazon, Stripe and more.

Our course completion rate is 90% and annual customer retention rate is 100%.

We have 65 B2B customers and we up-skill their employees in product management, growth and data analytics, just to start with.

Some customers: Walmart Mexico, Banorte (2nd bank in Mexico), Mercado Libre, BCP (#1 bank in Peru), Alicorp (leading CPG in Latam), Sura (leading pension fund), etc.
startups.rationale: Kurios — это платформа для когортного обучения, предоставляющая виртуальное пространство для группового взаимодействия, что близко к агенту организации рабочего пространства для групп.

startups.name: Jovian
startups.description:
Jovian is an online university for software development and data science. We offer practical and industry-focused programs that help professionals learn technical skills, build real-world projects, and advance their careers.

Students learn practical skills, build real-world portfolio projects, and undergo job readiness training. Our tutors offer 24x7 guidance & mentorship over Slack & Zoom. Students also get access to jobs with 200+ hiring partners.
startups.rationale: Стартап фокусируется на карьерном развитии и трудоустройстве, что ближе всего к агенту по профориентации, хотя Jovian — это целая программа, а не отдельный агент.

startups.name: StudyStream
startups.description:
StudyStream is a video platform & online community that allows students to study with others from around the world 24/7 and in real time. It brings accountability & motivation to the students from over 180 countries who study with us daily.

We have helped over 3 million students be more productive & motivated, while also feeling less isolated. Our mission is to create a global community of students who can motivate each other to succeed.
startups.rationale: StudyStream предоставляет видеоплатформу для совместной учёбы в реальном времени, что наиболее близко к агенту видео сервиса с комнатами для групповой работы.

startups.name: Strive Math
startups.description:
Strive is an online coding & math school for kids (8-16). We help students start and commit to their coding and math journeys by making the subjects fun and exciting. We focus, above all else, on making the process of learning joyful.

- We’re starting with coding, but we’re building the content and platform to redefine **STEM education globally** by teaching math, science, and other school subjects **through coding.**
- We believe we can only make education joyful if we ourselves are joyful, so creating a fun and exciting work environment is one of our core values. We’re a remote-first company with teachers and employees from South Africa, Singapore, India, the USA, and the Philippines.
- **We’re a well-funded startup backed by YCombinator and early investors of Spotify and Facebook.**
startups.rationale: Стартап Strive Math делает упор на радостное и увлекательное обучение через кодинг, что наиболее близко к агенту 20, предоставляющему игровой учебный контент для повышения вовлечённости и интереса учеников.

startups.name: AppX
startups.description: AppX empowers creators to launch their personal apps and websites to monetise their audience via courses and premium exclusive content.
startups.rationale: Стартап AppX — платформа для создания приложений и монетизации курсов, не является ИИ-агентом в рамках персонализированной модели образования и не совпадает по назначению ни с одним из 44 агентов.

startups.name: AlgoUniversity
startups.description:
We are building live teaching infrastructure that enables handful of top educators (from Google, Facebook, etc) to coach a large number of students.
We train college students in a year-long live cohorts and they pay us a portion of their salary as fees once they get a tech job (Income Sharing Agreement)
startups.rationale: Платформа для живого обучения требует видеосервиса с групповыми комнатами, что является основой инфраструктуры.

startups.name: Kiwify
startups.description:
Kiwify enables anyone to create and sell their online course in Brazil.
We provide payment processing, video streaming and student management
startups.rationale: Платформа для создания и продажи онлайн-курсов не соответствует ни одному ИИ-агенту каталога.

startups.name: Turing College
startups.description: Turing College is an online AI-driven school for busy professionals. We upskill & reskill in data science & AI, analytics, marketing and programming in 3-12 months with 1on1 support and flexibility.
startups.rationale: Стартап предоставляет AI-управляемую онлайн-школу с персонализированными траекториями обучения, что напрямую соответствует сути агента генерации траектории, создающего и адаптирующего индивидуальный план на основе диагностики и целей.

startups.name: UPchieve
startups.description:
UPchieve is an edtech nonprofit that provides free, 24/7 online tutoring to low-income HS students. Using our app, students can request and get paired with a live volunteer in under 5 minutes. We’ve matched 100,000+ requests so far.

Right now in the US, there are 8 million low-income HS students who don’t have anyone in their home who can help them with schoolwork. UPchieve is working to change that. Our vision is simple: we want to democratize access to academic support, so that every student has an equal opportunity to attend college and achieve upward mobility.
startups.rationale: Стартап соединяет учеников с живыми волонтерами-репетиторами, а каталог содержит только ИИ-агентов, автоматизирующих различные аспекты обучения.

startups.name: Poliglota
startups.description:
Poliglota is the online language school for Latam, where group classes are led by an instructor. Over 12,000 students have paid us $500 to learn english in order to get a higher income.
We offer an online service of personalized language sessions with small groups of people of the same level, guided by expert language coaches that we train in our social methodology.
startups.rationale: Стартап предоставляет синхронные групповые языковые занятия онлайн, что частично совпадает с функцией видеосервиса с комнатами для групповой работы.

startups.name: Kidato
startups.description: Parents in Africa face either public schools with student-teacher ratios as high as 50:1 or private schools with tuition fees as high as $7500 per year, per child. Kidato classes have student-teacher ratios of 5:1 and teach the same rigorous international curriculum as other private schools — but at a fraction of the price. In our second semester, Kidato has enrolled more than 30 students into our learning-from-home program as a replacement for brick-and-mortar schools. We expect to triple this enrollment by our third semester.
startups.rationale: Kidato является полноценной онлайн-школой с живыми учителями, а не отдельным ИИ-агентом из представленного каталога, и не соответствует ни одному конкретному агенту по функционалу.

startups.name: Unschool
startups.description: Unschool provides real-world professional education that colleges in India do not provide. We are a marketplace where college students in India can learn about technology, management and arts from high-quality courses created by experts from around the world.
startups.rationale: Платформа Unschool представляет собой структурированную библиотеку готовых курсов по технологиям, менеджменту и искусству с возможностью поиска и выбора, что соответствует функционалу агента «Библиотека контента».

startups.name: Codingal
startups.description:
Codingal (www.codingal.com) is the global leader in online AI and coding education for kids and teens (Grades 1-12). Our mission is to help students fall in love with AI & coding and become creators of the future - entrepreneurs, engineers, and scientists by providing high-quality, accessible, and personalized computer science education.

In many countries, top technical universities exist, but there’s a significant gap in K-12 programming education. Parents want their kids to start learning programming early, and that’s why they choose Codingal. We offer live, interactive classes with expert instructors from Computer Science backgrounds. All our instructors are rigorously vetted and trained to ensure a high-quality learning experience.

Every student receives a personalized learning path tailored to their age and skill level. Our curriculum is STEM.org-accredited, aligned with the K–12 Computer Science Framework, and delivered in 1:1 and small-group formats, ensuring individual attention and engagement.

Students learn by building real-world projects using popular tools and technologies like Scratch, Python, Roblox, Minecraft, MIT App Inventor, Thunkable, Pygame, HTML/CSS, JavaScript, website development, Java, Data Science, AP Computer Science content, and AI tools like ChatGPT and Machine Learning frameworks. Through this hands-on approach, students create apps, games, animations, and websites in a fun, engaging way that fosters problem-solving and creative skills.

Beyond classes, students participate in global coding competitions, hackathons like HPE CodeWars, and online coding camps, further nurturing their creativity, confidence, and innovative spirit. With a 4.9/5 student rating and NPS of 86, Codingal is trusted by over 1 million registered students in 70+ countries.

Codingal combines the best of human instruction and AI-driven learning to inspire the next generation of tech leaders. We are poised to lead the next generation of coding education and make a significant impact in this rapidly growing market.
startups.rationale: Стартап предоставляет персонализированную траекторию обучения, адаптированную под возраст и уровень навыков, что напрямую соответствует функции ИИ-агента генерации траектории.

startups.name: Coderhouse
startups.description:
A web app that offers live online courses in programming, design, data, online marketing and more.

Our courses are nearly as affordable as online Moocs (~$40 a month) and as effective as Bootcamps. We achieve this by running 100 person live classes with one expert professor and one mentor per 15 students. Every class, students need to turn in assignments that are corrected by their mentors and at the end of the course they need to turn in and approve a final project. We also help our selected students with careers services such as mockup interviews, Linkedin enhancement, and more. All of this creates a level of accountability that allows us to achieve really low churn levels (<9%).

Our career tracks last between 9-11 months and we give our selected students their money back in case they don't get a job 6 months after they are done with the course.
startups.rationale: Стартап делает упор на регулярную сдачу и проверку заданий менторами, что наиболее близко к функции автоматической проверки задач агентом №22.

startups.name: Scrimba
startups.description: Scrimba is a coding course platform with over 120K monthly active students. It's based on a new video format that makes the screencasts fully interactive for students, and easier to create for teachers. Our vision is to create a coding school that has the quality of Stanford but the price of a gym membership.
startups.rationale: Scrimba делает скринкасты интерактивными, что близко к функции агента 33 по встраиванию интерактивных элементов в учебные материалы, хотя Scrimba — это платформа, а не ИИ-генератор таких элементов.

startups.name: Kunduz
startups.description: Kunduz is making test prep resources 10x faster and cheaper for students who prepare for university entrance tests. With its first mobile platform, Kunduz provides instant answers to students’ test prep questions through its 35,000 tutors. Kunduz currently serves students in Turkey and India.
startups.rationale: Платформа Kunduz обеспечивает мгновенные ответы на вопросы студентов при подготовке к тестам, что функционально ближе всего к ИИ-помощнику, отвечающему на учебные вопросы с учётом контекста.

startups.name: AnnieCannons
startups.description: AnnieCannons (AC) is a 501(c)3 nonprofit dedicated to training survivors of human trafficking and gender-based violence to be programmers, giving them both the economic and technological empowerment to invent solutions to overcome the hardships they have survived, and the capacity to support themselves and their families.
startups.rationale: Стартап готовит переживших насилие к профессии программиста, что соответствует функции агента-профориентолога, связывающего обучение с карьерными перспективами.

startups.name: AskMyClass, now Soundkins
startups.description: AskMyClass, is a learning assistant that helps teachers save time and enhance learning, using smart speakers like Alexa, and help students get back-on-task quickly and build life skills through classroom management, social-emotional learning, and lesson support.
startups.rationale: Стартап — это голосовой ИИ-ассистент для помощи учителю и ученикам, что наиболее близко к ИИ-помощнику (агент 8), отвечающему на вопросы учеников по содержанию курса.

startups.name: Recurse Center
startups.description:
The Recurse Center is a self-directed, educational retreat for people who want to get better at programming, whether they've been programming for three decades or three months.

The retreat is free for all participants because we run an integrated recruiting agency and provide (optional) personalized recruiting services to anyone in our community considering a new job.
startups.rationale: Стартап предоставляет самонаправляемую среду для построения персональной траектории обучения, что наиболее близко к функции ИИ-агента генерации траектории.

startups.name: Acely
startups.description:
Acely is the leading AI tutor for the digital SAT and ACT, helping students get into their dream college. Our mission is to democratize opportunity for high school families through AI-native tools that empower students to learn smarter and gain confidence.

Backed by Forerunner Ventures, we've grown to $10M ARR with a lean, 10-person team, proof that small, mission-driven teams can deliver outsized impact. Our product has traction, our users are engaged, and we're now at an inflection point: ready to scale with speed, craft, and AI-native excellence.

Acely was launched out of beta in January 2024 as a spinout product from Juni (YC W18).
startups.rationale: Стартап Acely — это AI-тьютор для подготовки к SAT и ACT, который отвечает на вопросы учеников, даёт объяснения и адаптивные подсказки, что напрямую соответствует функционалу ИИ-помощника (агент 8) из каталога.

startups.name: NEXGENT
startups.description:
We can provide you with the skills, experience  and knowledge you need to skyrocket through the ranks of the IT industry faster than anyone even if you have zero experience right now.

Our job-ready training program (which is based on our thorough experience working at Cisco, Dimension Data, Arista, etc. and as IT instructors for the  U.S. Air Force) and and in-person certification will help you master the most in-demand networking skills in 2-5 months so that you can break into a tech job or get promoted.

Additionally, we provide 1:1 live mentorship from some of the best engineers in the world, skills assessment, career guidance and a proven system that can help you prioritize and execute your career plans confidently.

Apply to our program here: http://zerotoengineer.com
and/or
learn more here: http://help.nexgent.com
startups.rationale: Стартап предлагает программу обучения с карьерным наставничеством и системой планирования карьеры, что наиболее близко к агенту профориентации, связывающему учебные цели с профессиональными перспективами.

startups.name: Nimble
startups.description: Nimble uses predictive analytics to give every K-12 student access to excellent teachers. Our smart applicant tracking system (ATS) leverages a predictive model to help school districts identify and hire the best educators for their classrooms.
startups.rationale: Стартап Nimble — это система подбора учителей, а все агенты каталога направлены на персонализацию учебного процесса, обратную связь, создание контента и взаимодействие учеников, что не совпадает по назначению.

startups.name: Bloom Institute of Technology
startups.description:
Bloom Institute of Technology is a full computer science education that's free until you get a high-paying job.

We invest in our students, train them for free, and take a portion of income if they get a job above a certain threshold. If they never make above that threshold or don't get a job in the chosen field, they never pay us a dime.
startups.rationale: Стартап полностью ориентирован на трудоустройство (оплата обучения только при получении высокооплачиваемой работы), что совпадает с задачей агента соотносить учебные цели с профессиональными перспективами.

startups.name: Dost Education
startups.description:
Dost is an ed-tech nonprofit building a platform to expand access to early childhood development in low-resource settings through parent education. Our mission is to unlock children’s full potential by focusing on early learning - the time when 90% of our brains develop.

We believe that parents of any literacy level can play a critical role in developing their children’s school and life readiness. In India alone, there are 150 million under-resourced caregivers who can benefit from resources developed for them. That’s why our team at Dost Education - educators, entrepreneurs, and engineers - are passionate about using technology and user-centric product design to change the trajectory of families’ lives.

Since 2017, we’ve grown from a small pilot with a few hundred mothers, to reaching over 100,000 families working with state governments. Join us as we continue to innovate, grow our reach, and deepen our impact. We are supported by some of the best funders in tech and social impact space like Y Combinator, Mulago, and many others.

Dost Education values diversity. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, colour, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.
startups.rationale: Платформа Dost Education предоставляет родителям структурированный доступ к образовательным материалам по раннему развитию, что концептуально близко к агенту библиотеки контента, хотя ориентирована на родителей, а не на учителей.

startups.name: ClassDojo
startups.description: ClassDojo's mission is to give every kid an education they love. Our flagship communication app has become the world’s largest network serving kids, reaching over 51 million kids, families and teachers in 180 countries every month, entirely through word of mouth. They use it to share the best moments in a kid's day through pictures, videos, messages, and more. ClassDojo has recognized by Forbes, LinkedIn, Inc and Fast Company, and it is a top 100 Y Combinator company.
startups.rationale: ClassDojo — приложение для общения и обмена моментами (фото, видео, сообщения) между учителями, учениками и родителями, что ближе всего к встроенной системе обмена сообщениями (агент 44), но не включает расширенных инструментов групповой работы или геймификации.

startups.name: Pahamify
startups.description: Pahamify is an online learning platform for K-12 students in Indonesia. We provide high quality educational videos which can be used to learn various concepts ranging from math, science, social sciences, and language based on the local curriculum. We also provide thousands of practice questions and modules which can be used for college entry test preparation.
startups.rationale: Pahamify представляет собой структурированную библиотеку готовых учебных материалов (видео, задания, модули) с возможностями поиска и фильтрации, что близко к агенту 'Библиотека контента'.

startups.name: Jumpcut
startups.description: We help aspiring creators go viral and monetize their content.
startups.rationale: Стартап Jumpcut помогает создателям контента становиться вирусными и монетизировать его, что не соответствует ни одному ИИ-агенту из каталога, сфокусированному на инструментах персонализированной образовательной модели.

startups.name: Quero Education
startups.description:
Quero is an online marketplace for college programs in Brazil. It helps students search, compare and enroll in programs in over 1200 partner colleges, saving money on tuition.

Follow Us:
facebook.com/queroedu
instagram.com/queroedu
twitter.com/queroedu
quero.education/carreiras
startups.rationale: Стартап является онлайн-маркетплейсом для выбора и зачисления на программы колледжей, а не инструментом персонализации обучения, создания контента или других образовательных агентов из каталога.

startups.name: EduRev
startups.description:
EduRev is like a Netflix for Education with a layer of social networking. We want to make the process of education and learning so good that you (and your kids) don’t feel the need to go to a school/college/coaching. EduRev stands for Education Revolution and we are looking to achieve nothing less.

EduRev has over 7 million students and adds around 10 new users each minute. We are backed by the iconic American VC Y Combinator, Artiman Ventures and even angel investors like Anand Chandrashekaran, Austen Allred, Martin Basiri to name a few.

We won the Best App award (for learning) by Google, mBillionth award by Bill and Melinda Gates, and even won Startup of the Year by TieCon.

Android App: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.edurev
Website: http://edurev.in/
iOS App (beta): https://apps.apple.com/in/app/edurev/id1529835494
startups.rationale: EduRev is a content-first platform akin to a Netflix for Education, so its core function aligns most closely with a structured library of educational materials with search and filtering.

startups.name: StayQrious
startups.description: Imagine doing personalised workouts with a fitness coach, but for school subjects. Students log into their session that has been scheduled with their coach, they can see their learning workout for the day. Their workout typically consists of watching an interactive video, writing explanations, giving feedback to other students, making an explainer video etc. They get constant feedback and encouragement from the coach and progress only after they have understood the pre-requisites.
startups.rationale: Платформа StayQrious предоставляет персонализированные учебные 'тренировки' с коучем, что соответствует агенту генерации траектории, создающему пошаговый план обучения с адаптацией на основе прогресса.

startups.name: Ello
startups.description: Building the world's first 1:1 AI teacher.
startups.rationale: Стартап создаёт ИИ-учителя для индивидуального обучения, что ближе всего к агенту «ИИ-помощник», который анализирует контекст и уровень ученика для персонализированных объяснений.

startups.name: Demand Curve
startups.description:
Demand Curve is your startup's growth operating system, the lowest risk, fastest path to getting traction and growing your company.

🚀 Growth Program: A membership/course designed for startup operators who want to learn and execute growth without hiring a full team yet. Powered by our premium content library, expert guidance, and AI growth co-pilot, it's a step-by-step guide to building a growth engine that actually works. Trusted by 3,000+ startups (including over 500 YC companies).

📰 Newsletter: We also publish the Growth Newsletter, reaching 100,000+ founders and marketers every week with strategic and tactical growth advice. It's one of the most-read startup growth newsletters with 46-50% open rates.

🦄 Agency: For companies ready to scale, our agency team provides full-service execution across growth strategy, paid acquisition, and funnel optimization. We've helped scale Microsoft, Framer, Pilot, Ancestry, and hundreds of other companies and YC startups.

💸 Newsletter sponsorships: Get your brand in front of 100,000+ engaged founders and growth operators.

Learn more at demandcurve.com
startups.rationale: AI growth co-pilot программы Demand Curve выполняет роль ИИ-ассистента, отвечающего на вопросы участников по содержанию курса и дающего направляющие подсказки, что точно соответствует агенту «ИИ-помощник».

startups.name: Microverse
startups.description: Training and connecting untapped talent with global opportunities
startups.rationale: Стартап Microverse — это платформа для обучения и трудоустройства талантов, не соответствующая ни одному конкретному ИИ-агенту из каталога.

startups.name: Outtalent
startups.description:
We started Outtalent because we believe that talent is equally distributed, but opportunity is not and emerging markets have an exceptional number of great but undervalued engineers. We believe getting a job at one of the world’s best companies sets people on a great path to realize their full potential.

Outtalent is funded by YCombinator, world-class venture capital funds, executives from Google and Facebook, and other angel investors who are passionate about our mission. We have already helped software engineers from Russia, Ukraine and Central Asia get jobs at Google, Amazon, Microsoft and many other companies in the US, Canada, and Europe.
startups.rationale: Стартап Outtalent, как и ИИ-профориентолог, помогает пользователям находить карьерные возможности в ведущих компаниях, связывая текущие навыки с профессиональными перспективами.

startups.name: Juno College of Technology
startups.description: Juno is the university of the future.
startups.rationale: Стартап описывает университет будущего без конкретных деталей, не соответствующих ни одному узкому ИИ-агенту из каталога.

startups.name: Schoolable
startups.description:
We are a financial technology company that is revolutionizing the state of pre-tertiary education in Africa.

By paying school fees for parents upfront with a flexible monthly repayment plan, building fees savings culture among parents, This way, schools get up to 80% of all their expected fees 2weeks into resumption and also enabling schools to access to loan facility and availability of various vendors and service providers at discounted rates.
startups.rationale: Стартап является финтех-сервисом для оплаты обучения, не связан с персонализированным обучением, контентом или учебным процессом.

startups.name: Edyst
startups.description:
Edyst is a Y Combinator-funded company (W19) working in the online learning & employability space. We’re looking to collaborate with people who want to significantly change the current learning and employability system in India.

In a span of 2 years, we have hit some pretty impressive figures that some of the most established names haven’t:

- Our course completion rates are more than 80% (8x the industry average)
- Students spend an average of 95 minutes daily on the platform (5x the industry average)
- 50% placement ratio (2x the industry average)

We need more mavericks for this journey: people who love challenges & puzzles; people who love to learn & grow; people who want to significantly change the current learning and employability system.
startups.rationale: Edyst напрямую связывает онлайн-обучение с трудоустройством, что соответствует назначению ИИ-профориентолога по соотнесению учебных целей с карьерными перспективами.

startups.name: AccioJob
startups.description:
AccioJob is an ed-tech startup run by IIT Delhi Alumni that provides a comprehensive state-of-the-art learning platform for Full Stack Web Development and Data Analytics.

Our industry-relevant curriculum is taught by top tech instructors and mentors, and our students have gone on to work at leading tech companies like Amazon, Salesforce, and Walmart, among others. With job placement opportunities at 300+ top tech partner companies, we have placed 1000+ students in 2022 itself at an average salary of 8.3 LPA
startups.rationale: Стартап делает акцент на трудоустройстве студентов в топ-компании, что ближе всего к функции ИИ-профориентолога, связывающего учебные цели с карьерными перспективами.

startups.name: Skill-lync
startups.description: Skill-Lync provides job leading engineering education online. We started with a special focus in Mechanical, Electrical, Electronics, Civil & Computer Science engineering and have become one of the world's leading & highest rated platforms in teaching high-end technical skills that help students get a job.
startups.rationale: Skill-Lync предоставляет образование, направленное на трудоустройство, что наиболее близко к задаче ИИ-профориентолога — связывать учебные цели с профессиональными перспективами.

startups.name: RocketLit
startups.description:
RocketLit gives all students better access to learning and educators access to the data they need to be most impactful.

Our first product, RocketLit, is an adaptive and personalized learning platform that serves reading to students at their independent level. Students read the same content at different levels of complexity and fluidly move up reading levels as they improve.

InnerOrbit is our new Science Assessment platform, giving students, teachers and administrators the practice and data they need to be successful on science tests. We serve the highest quality content and feature the most detailed reporting on the market.

We’re a small and focused team working to change the world through science education. Our company has served over 650k students and we’re on track to more than double that number in the next year. We’re looking for folks who’ll grow into a leadership role within the organization.
startups.rationale: RocketLit адаптивно предоставляет одинаковый контент на разных уровнях сложности чтения, что совпадает с функцией агента по созданию вариантов заданий разного уровня по одной теме.

startups.name: Our World in Data
startups.description:
Poverty, disease, hunger, climate change, war, existential risks, and inequality: The world faces many great and terrifying problems. It is these large problems that our work at Our World in Data focuses on.

Our World in Data publishes an open-access publication where users can understand the state of the world today, where we are making progress and where we are falling behind. Through interactive data visualizations we can see how the world has changed; by summarizing the scientific literature we can understand why. We cover everything from global poverty to natural disasters, education and health; we have 3405 charts across 297 topics.

Our World in Data is free, open-source and provided as a public good. It has millions of users every month, and is cited in research and media across the world every day. This allows millions of people to understand the large problems the world is facing, and how we can solve them.
startups.rationale: Стартап представляет открытую публикацию данных и визуализаций о глобальных проблемах, что не соответствует функциям ни одного ИИ-агента каталога, ориентированного на персонализированное образование.

startups.name: Mimir
startups.description:
Mimir is venture backed startup in Indianapolis, Ind., focused on creating products to better computer science. We’re hiring rapidly to help satisfy the educational needs of instructors and students all over the world. Our primary product, the Mimir Classroom, is deployed in more than 70 universities allowing computer science instructors to teach their courses more effectively!

We don’t need (or want) you to be perfect, but we expect you to work hard, move fast, and constantly iterate until we get it right. If you’re looking to be challenged every day, make a huge impact, and help define a large part of the future of computer science, then this job is for you.
startups.rationale: Mimir Classroom автоматизирует проверку заданий по программированию, что соответствует агенту автоматической проверки стандартных задач с формированием оценок и выделением типичных ошибок.

Headquartered in San Francisco, it focuses on building a virtual English conversation partner for over 500 million children around the globe who are trying to learn English, but can't reach fluency because they lack genuine practice speaking the language. The company doubled down on its mobile app Buddy, the voice-based English tutor for kids, organically combining solutions developed by Buddy.ai and Edwin.

startups.name: Mystery.org
startups.description:
We started Mystery.org to create better explanations for every question children have about the world. We began with the 150 most common science questions that children ask teachers. We call this collection Mystery Science. Last year, more than 4 million children used Mystery Science in 50% of U.S. elementary schools. In an industry that is plagued by long sales cycles and high barriers to entry, we’ve sold thousands of schools without a single sales person. We’re backed by a great group of investors including Y Combinator, Learn Capital, and Reach Capital.

We’re now moving on to all the other questions children have that they’ll never learn in school. In the last 18 months we received over 500,000 questions from children eager for better explanations of the world.  Now we’re creating video explanations for every question. You can think of this like a visual Wikipedia for kids.

Our goal is to create a generation of better thinkers. We think this is the most important problem to solve in the world today.
startups.rationale: Mystery.org представляет собой структурированную библиотеку готовых видео-объяснений, доступных для поиска по вопросам — это наиболее близко к агенту 'Библиотека контента', предоставляющему релевантные учебные материалы по запросу.

We launched Py for Work to level the playing field for candidates and empower companies to take a skills-based approach to hiring. Our platform enables companies to assess candidates using real-world assessments, not brain teasers. We’re helping industry leaders like LiveRamp, Amplitude, and Factual approach hiring based on merit, not resume keywords.

Founded by female developers and artists, the company was originally built with girls in mind and pays special attention to increasing participation from young women and underrepresented minorities.

startups.name: LendEDU
